platform.title: IoT SIM Platform

platform.d: We turn your data into tangible security, actionable alerts, and a single IoT platform that controls your entire ecosystem. Designed to manage and monitor IoT devices in a centralized and secure way.
platform.caption: Platform designed to manage and monitor IoT devices in a centralized and secure way.

items.d: We are bringing our lab for live demonstrations focused on four key verticals: Healthcare, Industry, Smart City, Security.

items.t: IOT in Motion at ISC West 2026!

items.t: Expanded LoRaWAN coverage to Mendoza & Córdoba
items.d: New antennas in operation: we are now the largest LoRaWAN network in the country, ready for your next deployment.
Macro-metering rollout enabled early leak detection and optimized distribution across the network.

solutions.title: Flexibility and expertise, tailored to your needs.
solutions.sub: Pick an area and explore the solutions already running in the field.

items.d: LoRaWAN™ is a protocol designed specifically for IoT. It connects low-power devices and sensors over long distances, with multi-year battery life and km-range coverage. We operate the largest LoRaWAN network in Argentina.
Remote monitoring of hydraulic and electrical variables at residential or industrial scale, with periodic remote reading over LoRaWAN or NB-IoT.
A traffic monitoring solution using inductive loops to record vehicle speeds and counts over the long term.
A solution capable of monitoring the state of liquid or solid tanks, applicable to different use cases.
Devices installed on the street that detect whether a vehicle is parked. Used to monitor restricted areas or control dwell time.
Integrates a weather station with a communication system transmitting all measurements over long distances.
A solution to monitor dangerous gas concentrations in enclosed spaces (sensor certified by ENARGAS).
Connected devices deployed across hospitals to activate emergency protocols at the press of a button.
Real-time location of critical equipment via BLE beacons + LoRaWAN gateways.
Temperature, humidity and particulate sensors for operating rooms, pharmacies and medication storage.
Online monitoring of critical variables with real-time alerts. Know before the line stops.
Early detection of leaks, overloads and risk conditions with full traceability for audits.
Real-time OEE and predictive maintenance based on actual shop-floor data.
Monitor concentrations of dangerous gases. Sensors certified by ENARGAS, reports transmitted encrypted.
Water-level detection in wells, basements, tunnels and critical zones.
Anonymized sensors that measure occupancy and circulation patterns in public or private spaces.
Our own LoRaWAN network, encrypted communication and an architecture built for critical environments.
Devices with years of battery life and processes optimized to reduce consumption and waste.
A single console to manage thousands of sensors: alerts, reports, integrations and APIs.

projects.title: Real cases in operation.
projects.sub: Pick an area to see the projects already running in the field.

body.text: The municipality wanted to bring order to metered parking and reduce friction between residents and shop owners.
Our **IoT solution** was deployed as a network of **1,000 in-street magnetic sensors**, integrated with the SIM platform and a citizen app.
The system delivers **live information** on occupancy, infractions and dwell times.
Today, the city operates with **operational transparency**: real-time control and automatic reports.

cases.h: Mass water remote reading for AYSAM

body.text: AYSAM needed to detect leaks and put order in water billing across its residential network.
We implemented **remotely managed micro-metering** on **19,500 residential meters** with our own LoRaWAN backhaul.
Data reaches the operator's back office **every hour** triggering **automatic leak alerts**.
Result: less non-revenue water and traceability for regulatory audits.

cases.h: Optimization of critical response and patient safety

body.text: The clinic faced the challenge of optimizing response times during high-complexity events, such as **Code Blue**.
We deployed a **hospital communication and alert system** with highly reliable **Panic, Code Blue, and Beeper devices**.
**By generating precise metrics** on response times, the clinic stopped basing its protocols on subjective perceptions.
Today, the clinic has **proactive medical care** with absolute precision and a highly efficient operation.

cases.h: Precision environmental control and regulatory compliance

body.text: Guaranteeing **strict environmental conditions** in operating rooms and sterilization areas was critical.
We deployed **a network of high-precision thermal and humidity sensors** creating an **immutable digital record**.
**By generating automatic traceability reports**, the client eliminated error-prone manual checks.
Today, the client has a proactively safe surgical environment meeting international standards.
Enel needed to scale **remote reading of residential electrical meters** without its own infrastructure.
We deployed **30,000 meters** communicating over our LoRaWAN network.
Today the meter reading operation runs **without human intervention**, with a drastic reduction in errors.
Renault's plant needed **visibility into the energy consumption** of critical lines.
We deployed **per-line electrical sub-metering**, integrated to SIM, with real-time operational dashboards.
Result: early detection of inefficiencies and solid data for energy-efficiency investments.

cases.h: IoT + AI applied to physical security

body.text: We came back from **#ISCWest2026** with one clear conclusion: security is no longer just about monitoring — it's about **anticipating**.
We are integrating **AI + IoT + cybersecurity** to bring the most efficient tools to the Argentine market.
We help SMEs and large companies implement solutions that protect critical operations.

timeline.title: Over 10 years connecting things.
timeline.sub: A selection of key milestones, in chronological order.

about.title: Transforming the environment through technology.
about.p1: We are a passionate team deeply committed to digitizing the environment. We are solution architects: with a solid foundation, leveraging every opportunity technology offers us. We are providers with over 10 years of experience.
about.p2: We firmly believe the best solutions are born from collaboration. That's why we work side by side with our clients and partners, combining their business knowledge with our technical expertise.
about.p3: Our approach is comprehensive: we always apply the latest communication and data analysis technologies, integrating them with the devices you already have.
about.p4: To guarantee you control, all our efforts converge on data analysis. We use CLOUD services and apply AI strategies on all the collected information.

clients.title: They trust us to transform their projects.
